# fluttersdk_dusk

> E2E driver for Flutter apps targeting LLM agents and CI. 32 CLI commands and 31 MCP tools drive a running Flutter app over 28 `ext.dusk.*` VM Service extensions plus 3 `artisan:dusk:*` substrate-routed tools. Every gesture passes a 6-step actionability gate (defunct, enabled, zero-rect, off-viewport, stable, receives-events) with substring-parseable failure reasons. Snapshots emit YAML trees with stable `[ref=eN]` tokens; `dusk:find` mints re-resolvable `q<N>` predicate handles (Playwright Locator pattern). Debug-only at the consumer call site; release builds tree-shake the entire subsystem.

## Docs
- [Installation](https://fluttersdk.com/dusk/getting-started/installation.md)
- [Quickstart](https://fluttersdk.com/dusk/getting-started/quickstart.md)
- [Commands index](https://fluttersdk.com/dusk/commands/index.md)
- [dusk:snap](https://fluttersdk.com/dusk/commands/dusk-snap.md)
- [dusk:tap](https://fluttersdk.com/dusk/commands/dusk-tap.md)
- [dusk:find](https://fluttersdk.com/dusk/commands/dusk-find.md)
- [dusk:observe](https://fluttersdk.com/dusk/commands/dusk-observe.md)
- [dusk:screenshot](https://fluttersdk.com/dusk/commands/dusk-screenshot.md)
- [dusk:doctor](https://fluttersdk.com/dusk/commands/dusk-doctor.md)
- [dusk:install](https://fluttersdk.com/dusk/commands/dusk-install.md)
- [Actionability gate](https://fluttersdk.com/dusk/reference/actionability-gate.md)

- [MCP overview](https://fluttersdk.com/dusk/mcp/overview.md)
- [MCP setup (.mcp.json wiring)](https://fluttersdk.com/dusk/mcp/setup.md)
- [MCP tool reference (31 tools)](https://fluttersdk.com/dusk/mcp/tool-reference.md)
